name: knowledge_base
description: Knowledge base management skill for searching ingested documents, ingesting new content, listing vector collections, and tracking learning pipeline statistics.
author: ObsAI Team

search_top_k.description: Number of results to return from vector search

chunk_size.description: Default chunk size for document ingestion

actions.name: search_knowledge
actions.description: Search the knowledge base using semantic similarity. Queries vector collections for relevant documents, SPL examples, and configuration knowledge.

query.description: The search query in natural language

collection.description: Optional collection name to restrict the search to

actions.name: ingest_document
actions.description: Ingest a document into the knowledge base. Supports PDF, HTML, JSON, CSV, YAML, and plain text. Chunks and embeds the content for semantic retrieval.

path.description: File path or URL of the document to ingest

doc_type.description: Optional document type hint (pdf, html, json, csv, yaml, text). Auto-detected if omitted.

actions.name: list_collections
actions.description: List all available ChromaDB vector collections with document counts and metadata.

actions.name: get_learning_stats
actions.description: Get learning pipeline statistics including episode counts, success rates, confidence trends, and improvement trajectory.
